case_title: RAFAEL A. JOSEPH VS. AMERIPRISE AUTO & HOME INSURANCE

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT AMERIPRISE AUTO & HOME INSURANCE
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF JOSEPH, RAFAEL A.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-19-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-19-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOSEPH, RAFAEL A. AS TO DEFENDANT AMERIPRISE AUTO & HOME INSURANCE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED APR-21-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AMERIPRISE AUTO & HOME INSURANCE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-19-2008 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,070.00 FILED BY JOSEPH, RAFAEL A. AS TO DEFENDANT AMERIPRISE AUTO & HOME INSURANCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-19-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOSEPH, RAFAEL A. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AMERIPRISE AUTO & HOME INSURANCE BASED ON THE EVIDENCE SUBMITTED, THE COURT DETERMINES THAT PLAINTIFF DOES NOT HAVE STANDING TO MAKE THIS CLAIM, BECAUSE HE NO LONGER IS THE OWNER OR POSSESSOR OF THE VEHICLE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
